_comment: Mission-1 batch Phase-3 STAGED reconcile candidates - human approves in the Map client panel. Evidence pulled 2026-07-22/23 (read-only). Previews are FLIGHT-SCOPED (2026-06-01..07-31, matching the spec's table entries and the Grid's Jun-Jul rows).
preparedBy: Mission-1 batch prep session (Claude) - see PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md
platformAudit: Two tables, one account each, one Grid row per channel. TTD is an exact single-name rule; Google is an intentional match-all in its own scope - no scope holds two rules.
warnings: BASIS SPLIT: TTD cost = CLIENT-BILLED - the extreme 7.757 mult is a sheet artifact (media $185.69 x 7.757 = $1,440.40) and goes to 1 (staged). Google = raw media - mult 1 stays.
The TTD campaign runs since 04-30; pre-June spend ($1,234.41) belongs to no Grid row and is excluded by the spec's flight scope.
Google pair uses an empty match value (match-all within the account) - confirm the panel preserves it at approval.

pairs.rationale: 1 campaign. Flight-scoped June-onward $2,044.66; to 07-08 $1,484.80 vs sheet clientSpend $1,440.40 (+3.1%) - billed basis confirmed, extreme mult resolved. spendMult 7.757 -> 1.

Match-all within the account, flight-scoped 06-01..07-31 (campaign families PMax/[BRAND]/[RETAIL]/[SUBS] share no token). June-onward $4,174.08; to 07-08 $3,018.82 vs sheet mediaSpend $3,036.64 (-0.6% - the cleanest media-basis cross-check of the whole batch). Media basis: mult 1 stays.

unmatchedBq.note: Apr-30..May spend of the same campaign - no Grid row for that period; excluded by the flight scope.
